retrospective.reason: Architect spawn crashed mid-run (API ConnectionRefused) but core edits had already landed; lead verified completeness and finished.
retrospective.friction: The integration-architect subagent died on a terminal API connection error after ~33 tool uses, returning 0 tokens. The edits it had made were already on disk (i18n key removed, auto-promote block removed, InviteMemberModal warning removed), so the lead recovered by verifying the on-disk state rather than re-spawning. Recovery worked because this was a deletion-only story with easily greppable completion signals.
